user.title: Connect to Evertz Quartz Router
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your Evertz EQX/EQT router or MAGNUM controller.

detect.title: Detected Router Size
detect.description: Connected to {host}:{port}. The router was probed to auto-detect its size. Review and confirm — you can override if needed.

data_description.levels: V = video only. Append A, B, C… for audio. E.g. VABC switches video + 3 audio levels simultaneously.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect — check the IP address and port.

init.title: Evertz Quartz Router — Configure
init.description:
Current router: {host}  ({current_size})

Size and level changes apply immediately. Changing Max Destinations will reload the integration to create or remove entities.

data_description.max_sources: Number of sources the integration tracks. Applies live — no restart needed.
data_description.max_destinations: Number of destinations (= number of select entities). Changing this will reload the integration.
data_description.levels: Routing level(s) to switch. V = video, A/B/C = audio. E.g. VABC routes video + first 3 audio levels at once.
data_description.verbose_logging: Log every raw Quartz TX/RX frame at DEBUG level. Useful for troubleshooting; chatty on busy routers.
data_description.reconnect_delay: Seconds to wait before reconnecting after a connection drop.
data_description.connect_timeout: Maximum seconds to establish the initial TCP connection.

route.name: Route Source to Destination
route.description: Routes a source to a destination on the Evertz router.

levels.name: Levels
levels.description: Optional level override (e.g. V, VA, VABC). Defaults to the configured levels.
